metadata.title: Better Word Count
metadata.description: Counts the words of selected text in the editor.

regex.source: .setDesc("Reload required for change to take effect. Turn on to start collecting daily statistics of your writing. Stored in the path specified below. This is required for counts of the day as well as total counts.")
regex.target: .setDesc("需要重新加载以使更改生效。打开以开始收集您的每日写作统计。存储在下面指定的路径中。这是进行当日计数和总计数所必需的。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Turn on if you don't want markdown comments to be counted.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果你不希望计算markdown评论，请打开此选项。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Turn on if you want to display section word counts next to headings.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果你想在标题旁边显示节的字数，请打开此选项。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Set how many words count as one \"page\"")
.setDesc("Reload required for change to take effect. The location of the vault statistics file, relative to the vault root.")
regex.target: .setDesc("更改生效需要重新加载。保险库统计文件相对于保险库根目录的位置。")

regex.source: p0.textContent = "Here you can customize what statistics are displayed on the status bar when editing a markdown note."
regex.target: p0.textContent = "在这里可以自定义编辑 Markdown 笔记时状态栏上显示的统计信息."

regex.source: p1.textContent = "Here you can customize what statistics are displayed on the status bar when not editing a markdown file."
regex.target: p1.textContent = "在这里可以自定义在非编辑 Markdown 文件时状态栏显示的统计信息."
